info.title: Raidr API
info.description: Backend API for Raidr including user authentication and profile management.

200.description: OTP verified successfully. Returns JWT token.

post.summary: Sign in with Google Firebase Token

get.summary: Get all avatars and their lock status based on user level

locked.description: True if the avatar is locked (user level is too low). False if unlocked.

requiredLevel.description: The user level required to unlock this avatar

get.summary: Get all environment keys for maps and AI

weather.description: Object containing detailed weather data (from OpenWeather API)

images.description: Array of beautiful image URLs of the location (from Google Places API)

post.description: Updates the navStatus of a trip (e.g. 'navigating', 'paused', 'idle')

0.name: The Restaurant at Address Sky View

post.summary: Save a generated journey to the database

get.summary: Get all trips for the authenticated user
